summary: Fixed outcomes page form layout and interaction defects reported from the deployed UI: reference button alignment, copied-reference status placement, sticky guidance panel positioning and Cancel edit behaviour.

task.request: Fix four reported outcomes page UI defects: copy reference alignment, copied-reference status placement, sticky help panel position and non-working Cancel edit button.

userReportedDefects: Copy reference button did not line up with the reference input.
Copied IMPCT-RCD status appeared beside the button and caused wrapping.
Sticky right-hand help panel did not stick in the correct location when inputs received focus.
Cancel edit button did not do anything.

decisions.decision: Move copied-reference status below the input/button row in browser code rather than changing input IDs or form payloads.
decisions.reason: This preserves existing GOV.UK input macro output, field names and API payloads while fixing layout behaviour.

decisions.decision: Move sticky panel positioning back to SCSS and remove inline top positioning from the controller.
decisions.reason: The inline top override made the panel location brittle across viewport and browser chrome states.

decisions.decision: Add explicit cancel-edit state management in the impact tracker and a defensive fallback handler in the outcomes controller.
decisions.reason: Cancel edit should reset edit state reliably even if script initialisation order or missing project context changes.

decisions.decision: Do not directly edit generated public/css/outcomes.css.
decisions.reason: Repository policy treats generated CSS as SCSS-derived output committed by the formatter workflow.

validation.localValidation: Not run in this connector-only session.
connectorVerification: Confirmed src/styles/outcomes.scss contains new reference field, row, copy-status, hidden-action and sticky panel rules.
Confirmed public/js/outcomes-page.js moves the copied-reference status below the reference row and no longer writes panel.style.top = '96px'.
Confirmed public/js/outcomes-page.js includes defensive cancelImpactEdit handling.
Confirmed public/components/impact-tracker.js includes setCancelEditVisible and cancelEdit, clears copy status and re-hides Cancel edit on reset.
Confirmed tests/outcomes-page-route-state.test.js pins the new SCSS and JS contracts.

residualRisk: The PR should not be considered fully validated until normal PR checks complete.
The format workflow should commit regenerated public/css/outcomes.css if the SCSS output changes.
